response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of fullstack work, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, and a demonstrated testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, test-library author, trunk-based development). React exposure is present but lighter than his Ember background, and Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly evidenced, so the interview should probe primary-stack specifics; otherwise he is a strong fit for an internal automation tooling role.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience well beyond the 6-year requirement, including cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong testing and engineering-practice credentials: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, both core to the primary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
Kotlin is absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary (robotics tooling, ~2016-2018)

key_factors.factor: Gaps in primary-stack specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, limited React)
